name: Stage 2 — Role-Specific Questions
description: Participants claim role-specific questions. The Finance role answers revenue and total variable cost; the Founder role names the core business issue. Each still has one best answer that follows directly from the fixed financials — claiming and roles add structure, not subjectivity, so the arms are still expected to converge.

tasks.name: Finance · Monthly revenue
tasks.hitl_prompt: As the finance analyst, select the startup's monthly revenue.

tasks.name: Finance · Total variable cost
tasks.hitl_prompt: As the finance analyst, select the total monthly variable cost if all 1,080 active users (free + paid) create cost.

fin_variable_cost.label: What is total variable cost if all 1,080 users create cost?

tasks.name: Founder · Core business issue
tasks.hitl_prompt: As the founder, select the main business issue given the unit economics.

founder_problem.label: What is the main business issue?

context_brief_template: Answer your claimed role question from the fixed financials. Finance figures (revenue $6,000, total variable cost $2,160 on 1,080 users) are direct calculations; the core business issue is that there are too many users driving up variable cost.
